name: insurance claims coordinators processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims coordinators processing 10–20 claims/month, manual tracking causes delays in updates, leading to frustrated clients. We automate status updates instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Manual tracking of claim statuses leads to delays in updates and communication.
features: manual entry option for claims not in the system
